data.previous_feedback:
here are some feedbacks:
The JSON schema is correctly formatted, but it contains no extracted content. To fulfill the task, you need to provide the actual job description text so we can populate each field (skills, responsibilities, evaluation criteria, etc.) with the items explicitly mentioned in that description.

here are the changes:
Please share the full job description, and I will return a completed JSON with all key requirements and evaluation criteria extracted and structured.

task_history.content:
---
## VERSION 0
```json
{
  "job_description_analysis": {
    "steps": [
      "Read and parse the job description document.",
      "Identify required skills (technical and soft skills).",
      "Extract required experience level.",
      "Determine key responsibilities and duties.",
      "Identify any specific certifications or qualifications.",
      "Extract evaluation criteria (e.g., problem-solving, coding skills, communication skills).",
      "Identify technologies and tools mentioned.",
      "Determine the scope and complexity of tasks described.",
      "Identify industry-specific knowledge requirements.",
      "Note any specific domain expertise required.",
      "Determine essential personality traits and cultural fit indicators.",
      "Identify key performance indicators (KPIs) mentioned or implied.",
      "Summarize the core job requirements and responsibilities.",
      "Prioritize requirements based on frequency and emphasis in the description.",
      "Create a structured representation of the requirements and evaluation criteria."
    ]
  }
}
```

---
## FEEDBACK to VERSION 1
here are some feedbacks:
The JSON schema is correctly formatted, but it contains no extracted content. To fulfill the task, you need to provide the actual job description text so we can populate each field (skills, responsibilities, evaluation criteria, etc.) with the items explicitly mentioned in that description.

here are the changes:
Please share the full job description, and I will return a completed JSON with all key requirements and evaluation criteria extracted and structured.
